_publications._publicationTitle: Selective nitration of Hsp90 acts as a metabolic switch promoting tumor cell proliferation.

_contextSnippet: significantly decreased basal and ATP-linked respiration, increased proton leak, and decreased maximal respiration...Only NO2 Hsp90 and Hsp90 NY56 increased glycolysis
details: Nitrated Hsp90 decreased all mitochondrial parameters including basal and ATP-linked respiration, increased proton leak, and decreased maximal respiration. Hsp90 NY56 increased glycolysis
